text: Artificial intelligence is changing our world, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major issue is bias: if AI is trained on biased data, it can make unfair decisions, for example in hiring or loan applications. This is why fairness is essential—AI systems should treat everyone equally. Privacy is another concern. Many AIs collect large amounts of personal data, which must be protected to avoid misuse. To build trust, transparency is crucial; people need to understand how AI makes decisions. Ultimately, responsible AI development means considering these issues from the start, so that technology benefits everyone without causing harm.
